📍설악산 대청봉(1,708m) 대한민국에서 세 번째로 높은 봉우리이자 설악산의 최고봉입니다. 웅장한 암릉과 사계절 아름다운 풍경으로 많은 등산객들의 버킷리스트 명산으로 꼽히죠. 🥾 이번 코스 소공원 → 비선대 → 천불동계곡 → 희운각대피소(1박) → 대청봉 → 공룡능선 → 마등령 → 소공원 특히 공룡능선은 국내 최고의 암릉 산행 코스로 손꼽히며, 힘든 만큼 잊지 못할 절경을 선물해 줍니다. ⛰️ 한 번 오르면 왜 '역시 설악산'이라는 말이 나오는지 직접 느끼게 되는 대한민국 대표 명산입니다.

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven for countless living creatures. Wetlands are not empty spaces waiting to be developed. They are nurseries for birds, natural water filters, flood defenses, and wildlife habitats that cannot be replaced once lost.

bsky.text:
Gillian Anderson has officially revealed the upcoming 1,478-piece LEGO set for THE X-FILES.

The set is centered on Mulder’s office, paired with a forest clearing scene and a hovering UFO. 

Includes 8 minifigures, featuring Mulder, Scully, The Flukeman & more.

August 4.

bsky.text: This is Zebby. He refuses to go on a walk unless both of his parents join. Ohana means family, and family means everybody gets their steps in. 13/10 (TT: zebbythegolden)

bsky.name: Elizabeth Warren
bsky.text:
Another private equity victim: FIRE TRUCKS.

PE has ripped off fire departments and overcharged for trucks and engines, putting our safety at risk.

Today, I introduced bipartisan legislation that'll force the FTC to investigate this. Our fire fighters deserve better.

bsky.text:
